topics.title: New Year's Celebration Plans and Late Night Appearances
topics.summary: The studio discusses potential musical acts for a New Year's Eve celebration while reflecting on recent television appearances on the Conan and Jimmy Kimmel shows.

topics.title: Media Appearances and Cultural Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses various media appearances, the impact of celebrity performances on radio sales, a discussion regarding the execution of Saddam Hussein, and personal anecdotes about fashion choices and upcoming events.

topics.title: Tragic News and Radio Show Updates
topics.summary: The studio discusses the recent passing of a friend's girlfriend, upcoming radio appearances, and various personal anecdotes regarding travel and health.

topics.title: New Year's Resolutions and Rock Legends
topics.summary: The studio discusses personal fitness goals, the challenges of running marathons, and the aging appearance of classic rock icons.

topics.title: Dangerous Concert Experiences and Football Pool Results
topics.summary: The studio discusses chaotic concert scenes involving explosives, the results of a long-running football pool, and various anecdotes regarding local bands and television history.

topics.title: Football Pool Results and NFL Analysis
topics.summary: The studio announces the winners of a $25,000 football pool while discussing upcoming playoff matchups and betting outcomes.

topics.title: Will Murray's Engagement and Proposal
topics.summary: The studio celebrates producer Will Murray’s engagement, discussing his proposal on a beach, the cost of his ring, and the tradition of calling the bride's parents.

topics.title: Producer Duties and Brett Favre Retirement
topics.summary: The studio discusses the professional responsibilities of a radio producer, the upcoming marriage of a staff member, and the emotional retirement of football player Brett Favre.

topics.title: Media Blunders and Dick Clark's New Year's Eve
topics.summary: The studio reviews various news broadcast errors involving mispronounced words and discusses the decline of Dick Clark's performance during his New Year's Eve countdown.

topics.title: Martha Stewart Interview and Music Discussion
topics.summary: The studio discusses the recent interview with Martha Stewart, various radio station format changes, and a specific musical track featuring a B.B. King sample.

topics.title: Musical Influences and Fatherhood
topics.summary: The studio explores the emotional impact of specific songs, the complexities of father-son relationships, and the growth that comes from realizing a parent's human flaws.

topics.title: Parental Dynamics and Celebrity Holiday Greetings
topics.summary: The studio explores the complexities of father-son relationships, discusses the differences between satellite radio providers, and reacts to various celebrity holiday cards and fan interactions.

topics.title: Satellite Radio Growth and Media Influence
topics.summary: The studio discusses the rapid growth of satellite radio as reported by the New York Times, the influence of Howard Stern on modern media through figures like Stuttering John, and personal reflections on retirement and future plans.

topics.title: Stuttering John and James Brown Tributes
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding Stuttering John’s hiring by Jay Leno, the dismissal of Judith Reagan from her publishing role, and a collection of clips featuring late soul singer James Brown.

topics.title: Tribute to James Brown
topics.summary: The studio reflects on the musical legacy, cultural impact, and personal significance of James Brown following his passing.

topics.title: Media Coverage and Pop Culture Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses a variety of topics including international news footage, celebrity behavior, sports highlights, and the results of listener-voted television categories.

topics.title: Entertainment News and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The studio discusses various entertainment topics including the success of Night at the Museum, Oprah Winfrey's charitable initiatives, a heated feud between Donald Trump and Rosie O'Donnell, and recent celebrity news involving Lindsay Lohan and beauty pageants.
